name: claude-agent-pipeline
description: A self-orchestrating multi-agent dev pipeline for Claude Code. One orchestrator loop watches a backlog, dispatches specialist agents on demand, and routes work through scan → ticket → implement → review → human-merge. Stack-agnostic; ships an opinionated TypeScript/React preset.
author: Ryan Amundson

scripts.test: node bin/cli.js list-agents > /dev/null && node bin/cli.js list-presets > /dev/null && echo 'cli smoke ok'
